name: Taco Bell Express
validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.

internal_unresolveds.reason: No FPR — zero financial performance disclosure for Express Units. Prospective licensees have no official guidance on revenues, costs, or profitability.
Franchise incentives growing ($34M→$43M). Are Express units specifically receiving incentives? What are the terms?
Revenue breakdown between Traditional ($663M total) and Express not disclosed. Express represents ~3.6% of system units.
Integrated Expansion Policy content not in FDD body. Referenced as source of possible temporary impact protection.
7 company-owned units reacquired in Texas in 2024 — reason for licensee exit not disclosed.
2025 follow-on securitization planned but not yet executed. May affect fee structures or covenant requirements.
Royalty rate differential: Express 10% vs Traditional 5.5%. Not a contradiction per se but creates significant cost disadvantage for Express format. Not prominently flagged in FDD body.
System trajectory vs projected growth: Item 20 shows declining system (-27 over 3 years) but projects 8 new units. Projections may be optimistic given 11-20 closures per year.
No renewal rights vs elaborate successor policy: Item 17 states 'No renewal rights' but describes successor policy in detail. Legally distinct but potentially confusing.
